glosses.ja: 要求する; 必要とする

translations.es: Exigimos la devolución de nuestro dinero.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi yêu cầu hoàn tiền.
translations.hi: हम अपने पैसे की वापसी की मांग करते हैं.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject of the clause.

Finite main verb (present tense, indicative). Together with the separable particle 'zurück' it forms the separable verb 'zurückfordern' (‘to demand back’), selecting the accusative object 'unser Geld'.
Possessive determiner modifying 'Geld'; agrees with it (neuter singular accusative) and marks possession.
Common noun, accusative singular; direct object of 'fordern'.
Separable verbal particle belonging to 'fordern' (forms 'zurückfordern'); appears clause-final and contributes the ‘back’ meaning.

translations.es: Los padres exigen clases más pequeñas.
translations.fr: Les parents exigent des classes plus petites.
translations.it: I genitori esigono classi più piccole.
translations.zh-Hans: 家长们要求更小的班级规模。
translations.yue: 家長要求縮小班級人數。
translations.tr: Veliler daha küçük sınıflar talep ediyor.
translations.vi: Phụ huynh yêu cầu lớp học nhỏ hơn.
translations.id: Orang tua menuntut kelas yang lebih kecil.
translations.ja: 保護者は少人数のクラスを求めています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative plural; determiner of 'Eltern' (the subject).
Common noun, nominative plural; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (present tense, indicative); takes an accusative object ('kleinere Klassen').
Comparative adjective used attributively; agrees with 'Klassen' (accusative plural) and modifies it.
Common noun, accusative plural; direct object of 'fordern'.

sentences.target: Sie fordern endlich Ruhe im Treppenhaus.

translations.de: Sie fordern endlich Ruhe im Treppenhaus.
translations.en: They demand quiet in the stairwell.
translations.es: Exigen por fin silencio en la escalera.
translations.fr: Ils exigent enfin le calme dans la cage d’escalier.
translations.it: Pretendono finalmente silenzio nel vano scale.
translations.ko: 그들은 드디어 계단에서 조용히 해 달라고 요구합니다.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们终于要求楼道里安静。
translations.yue: 佢哋終於要求樓梯間要安靜。
translations.ru: Они наконец требуют тишины в подъезде.
translations.pt: Eles exigem finalmente silêncio na escada do prédio.
translations.he: הם דורשים סוף סוף שקט בחדר המדרגות.
translations.tr: Apartman merdivenlerinde nihayet sessizlik talep ediyorlar.
translations.vi: Họ cuối cùng cũng yêu cầu yên lặng ở khu cầu thang.
translations.ar: هم يطالبون أخيرًا بالهدوء في درج הבناية.
translations.nl: Zij eisen eindelijk rust in het trappenhuis.
translations.uk: Вони нарешті вимагають тиші в під'їзді.
translations.hi: वे आखिरकार सीढ़ियों में शांति की मांग करते हैं.
translations.pl: Oni wreszcie domagają się ciszy na klatce schodowej.
translations.nb: De krever endelig ro i trappeoppgangen.
translations.id: Mereka akhirnya menuntut ketenangan di tangga.
translations.sv: De kräver äntligen lugn i trapphuset.
translations.ro: Ei cer în sfârșit liniște pe casa scării.
translations.da: De kræver endelig ro i opgangen.
translations.ja: 彼らはついに階段での静けさを求めています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative; subject. Ambiguous form (3rd person plural ‘they’, 3rd person singular feminine ‘she’, or formal ‘you’); here most plausibly ‘they’.
Finite main verb (present tense, indicative); selects an accusative object ('Ruhe') and allows a locative PP ('im Treppenhaus').
Sentence/modality adverb expressing speaker attitude/urgency; modifies the predicate.
Common noun, accusative singular; direct object of 'fordern'.
Contracted preposition + article ('in' + 'dem'); heads a dative prepositional phrase indicating location.
Common noun, dative singular; object of the preposition 'im' (in dem).

sentences.target: Wir fordern bezahlbare Mieten in der Stadt.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈfɔʁdɐn bəˈtsaːlbaːʁə ˈmiːtn ɪn deːɐ̯ ʃtat/

translations.de: Wir fordern bezahlbare Mieten in der Stadt.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈfɔʁdɐn bəˈtsaːlbaːʁə ˈmiːtn ɪn deːɐ̯ ʃtat/
translations.en: We demand affordable rents in the city.
translations.es: Exigimos alquileres asequibles en la ciudad.
translations.fr: Nous exigeons des loyers abordables en ville.
translations.ko: 도시에서 감당할 수 있는 임대료를 요구합니다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们要求城市里的房租负担得起。
translations.yue: 我哋要求城市入面嘅租金負擔得起。
translations.ru: Мы требуем доступную аренду в городе.
translations.he: אנחנו דורשים שכר דירה בר־השגה בעיר.
translations.tr: Şehirde uygun fiyatlı kiralar talep ediyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi yêu cầu giá thuê ở trong thành phố phải vừa túi tiền.
translations.ar: نحن نطالب بإيجارات ميسورة في المدينة.
translations.nl: We eisen betaalbare huren in de stad.
translations.uk: Ми вимагаємо доступної оренди в місті.
translations.hu: Megfizethető bérleti díjakat követelünk a városban.
translations.hi: हम शहर में किफायती किराए की मांग करते हैं.
translations.nb: Vi krever rimelige leiepriser i byen.
translations.id: Kami menuntut harga sewa yang terjangkau di kota.
translations.sv: Vi kräver överkomliga hyror i staden.
translations.da: Vi kræver overkommelige huslejer i byen.
translations.ja: 私たちは都市で手頃な家賃を求めています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (present tense, indicative); takes the accusative NP 'bezahlbare Mieten' and a locative PP 'in der Stadt'.
Attributive adjective (from verb + -bar), positive degree; agrees with 'Mieten' (accusative plural).
Common noun, accusative plural; direct object of 'fordern'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a locative PP.
Definite article, dative singular feminine; determiner of 'Stadt' within the PP.
Common noun, dative singular; object of the preposition 'in'.
